compounds.frequency: 2x over 2 days, then 8 days off (every 10 days)

protocol_notes: OP uses 5mg vials of TB-500, splitting into 2x 2.5mg injections over 2 consecutive days followed by 8 days off (10-day cycle). Using sterile water instead of bacteriostatic water because shelf life is not a concern given rapid use of reconstituted vial. Notes TB-500 typical dosage is 4-8mg per week and 5mg is on the low end.
